title: Class notes from the teaching years
metaDescription: Former Yoga class notes and fees from Patricia Smith's teaching years (2009–2021). Yoga classes are no longer offered.

blocks.html: These notes are from when Patricia offered community and private Yoga. Teaching paused in 2021 so she could focus on Touch for Health Kinesiology and Nutrition — they are kept here for context, not as a current offer.

PRIVATE YOGA CLASS – ONE STUDENT – 90 MINUTES$100
10 x CONCESSION CARD FOR PRIVATE CLASSES, VALID FOR 6 MONTHS10 % DISCOUNT OF TOTAL PRICE
For today’s Kinesiology and Nutrition sessions, see sessions and cost or book online.
